title: So is this suppose to be released this year
display_title: So is this suppose to be released this year
wikitext:
[]: So is this suppose to be released this year? Post by duexmachina » Tue May 15, 2012 2:21 am I haven't been fixating on Eva so the wait time moves faster. My question is, will this still be a summer release? There is no trailer out for 3.0 yet or new information.Shouldn't we have more by now? I don't want to sound like an impatience man, I'm just a bit out of the loop.

[]: Post by Ornette » Tue May 15, 2012 2:35 am http://www.evageeks.org/2011/08/evangelion-q-autumn-2012/ http://forum.evageeks.org/post/488733/Evangelion-20-on-NTV-August-26/#488733 http://forum.evageeks.org/post/514537/Evangelion-Official-Website-News-Discussion/#514537

[]: Post by EVAJedi » Tue May 15, 2012 7:12 am Thanks. Now we will see if it happens on time.

[]: Re: So is this suppose to be released this year? Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue May 15, 2012 9:28 am duexmachina wrote: There is no trailer out for 3.0 yet or new information.Shouldn't we have more by now?

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue May 15, 2012 11:54 am Stay positive. I'm 100% certain it will be released this year. The guys at Khara just take their sweet time to prep the film & why spend a lot of cash marketing the film when Eva is an establishment out there. We'll probably get trailers or what not in July/August. Then the fun begins!

[]: Post by hui43210 » Tue May 15, 2012 2:36 pm Im ready to Nerdgasem

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed May 16, 2012 7:44 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: why spend a lot of cash marketing the film when Eva is an establishment out there.

[]: Post by Warren Peace » Thu May 17, 2012 1:21 am The film does have a new distributor, so previous roll outs may not reflect the way things go down this time. It won't happen, but I'd love it if they show NOTHING ahead of the release -- no traditional trailers, just black screens with white letters advertizing the title and release date. The wide-open mystery of this film is the biggest selling point to me.

[]: Post by liquidus118 » Thu May 17, 2012 6:04 am Warren Peace wrote: The film does have a new distributor, so previous roll outs may not reflect the way things go down this time. It won't happen, but I'd love it if they show NOTHING ahead of the release -- no traditional trailers, just black screens with white letters advertizing the title and release date. The wide-open mystery of this film is the biggest selling point to me.

[]: Post by Warren Peace » Thu May 17, 2012 6:42 am A film like this presents a lot of fun marketing opportunities. I'm kinda disappointed that they just went with your standard "random action clips set to theme music" thing. They could play around with expectations more.

[]: Post by Noriko is my wife » Thu May 17, 2012 12:27 pm At this Evangelion exhibit (http://www.crunchyroll.com/anime-news/2012/05/12-1/a-look-inside-the-miyazaki-prefecture-art-center-evangelion-exhibit9) Shinji Higuchi was present for a talk with anime journalist Ryusuke Hikawa/Q&A session. As far as he knew the fall release will happen. 「僕が知る限りでは大丈夫。信じて待って欲しい」 https://twitter.com/#!/cafe_hoopla/status/199125522997972992 And all the recent marketing campaigns involving Eva didn't just appear out of nowhere so I wouldn't worry much just because there is no trailer yet.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu May 17, 2012 9:53 pm Warren Peace wrote: The film does have a new distributor, so previous roll outs may not reflect the way things go down this time.

[]: Post by liquidus118 » Fri May 18, 2012 9:56 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by chee » Fri May 18, 2012 1:08 pm Yes. Yes it is.

[]: Post by gorgeousshutin » Fri May 18, 2012 8:05 pm Please let it happen on time this time . If we have to wait any longer RoE would be coming out even later than the story's 2015 timeline.[/b]

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri May 18, 2012 8:58 pm Well, considering we keep hearing Fall 2012 for the various Q/3.0 marketing campaigns and Final/? will be 2013 , 3.0 damn well better be released this year. I'm assuming this means--similar to 1.0 and 2.0 being worked on back-to-back--(according to 2.0 Complete Records Collection ), 3.0 and 4.0 are being worked on back-to-back.

[]: Post by Warren Peace » Fri May 18, 2012 9:37 pm I don't know if reprising the hospital scene for Rebuild would be the worst possible thing they could do or totally awesome . Maybe both. liquidus118 wrote: I'd love them to advertise it entirely using scenes from EoE and D&R. Actually, I just want the ad campaign to mess with people as much as possible. Remember the stuff they did with EoE? Just 15 seconds of screaming and flashing imagery? Stuff like that.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri May 18, 2012 10:05 pm Warren Peace wrote: I don't know if reprising the hospital scene for Rebuild would be the worst possible thing they could do or totally awesome . Maybe both.

[]: Post by Warren Peace » Fri May 18, 2012 10:22 pm "Which of destiny's children will touch themselves to an unconscious Asuka!?" -Misato, Q preview narration

[]: Post by Stryker » Fri May 18, 2012 11:15 pm And then came to the scene that was[s:1d8rv8de]n't[/s:1d8rv8de] to be.

My question is, will this still be a summer release? There is no trailer out for 3.0 yet or new information.Shouldn't we have more by now? I don't want to sound like an impatience man, I'm just a bit out of the loop.
